ISSUE_SUMMARY: Webhook deliveries failing with 403 errors to customer's endpoint after infrastructure change.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Customer had updated their firewall rules and forgot to whitelist our webhook IPs. Provided the updated IP range list and verified successful webhook delivery.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Customer unable to log in after password reset. MFA token not being accepted despite correct entry.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Reset MFA configuration and re-enrolled the user. Cleared cached authentication tokens on the server side. Verified successful login after re-enrollment.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Customer unable to configure custom email templates for automated notifications.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Walked the customer through the template configuration API. Found their HTML template had unsupported CSS properties. Provided a compatible template library.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Customer requesting ability to export reports in PDF format with custom branding.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Logged feature request FR-4521. Provided workaround using the API to generate HTML reports that can be converted to PDF with their branding. Escalated to product team.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Customer requesting ability to export reports in PDF format with custom branding.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Logged feature request FR-4521. Provided workaround using the API to generate HTML reports that can be converted to PDF with their branding. Escalated to product team.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Batch data import jobs timing out when processing files over 500MB.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Increased the batch processing timeout limits and enabled chunked upload mode. Recommended splitting files into 100MB segments for optimal throughput.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Data synchronization failure resulted in partial data in the staging environment.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Identified a network interruption during sync. Ran a full resynchronization and implemented checksum validation to detect partial transfers in the future.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Environment variable configuration not persisting across application restarts.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Identified the customer was setting variables at the session level instead of the environment level. Updated configuration to use persistent environment settings.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: REST API returning inconsistent schema in responses breaking the customer's ETL pipeline.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Identified a version mismatch where the customer was hitting both v2 and v3 endpoints. Consolidated all calls to v3 and provided migration guidance for deprecated fields.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Vulnerability scan showing outdated TLS version on the customer's dedicated endpoint.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Upgraded the TLS configuration from 1.1 to 1.3 on the customer's dedicated endpoint. Ran compliance scan to verify all cipher suites meet current security standards.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Export job produced incomplete CSV files missing the last several thousand rows.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Found a memory limit being hit during export serialization. Increased the export buffer size and re-ran the export job with verification checksums.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Customer wants automated anomaly detection alerts on their key business metrics.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Logged feature request FR-4602. Demonstrated how to set up threshold-based alerts as an interim solution using existing notification rules.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Export job produced incomplete CSV files missing the last several thousand rows.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Found a memory limit being hit during export serialization. Increased the export buffer size and re-ran the export job with verification checksums.

RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Found a memory limit being hit during export serialization. Increased the export buffer size and re-ran the export job with verification checksums.

RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Confirmed duplicate charge in payment system. Issued immediate refund for the duplicate transaction and added a billing flag to prevent recurrence.

RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Investigated access logs and confirmed unauthorized access attempts. Forced password reset for affected accounts, enabled geo-based login restrictions, and provided detailed incident report.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Request for real-time collaboration features in the report builder.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Batch data import jobs timing out when processing files over 500MB.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Increased the batch processing timeout limits and enabled chunked upload mode. Recommended splitting files into 100MB segments for optimal throughput.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Request for real-time collaboration features in the report builder.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Created feature request FR-4589. Shared the product roadmap timeline showing this feature planned for Q3. Offered early beta access when available.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Data synchronization failure resulted in partial data in the staging environment.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Identified a network interruption during sync. Ran a full resynchronization and implemented checksum validation to detect partial transfers in the future.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Custom middleware integration dropping events under high throughput conditions.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Increased the event queue buffer size and implemented dead-letter queue processing. Added monitoring alerts for queue depth thresholds.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Role-based access control rules not being applied correctly to new team members.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Found a caching issue with the RBAC policy engine. Cleared the policy cache, corrected the role hierarchy, and verified permissions for all affected users.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Salesforce integration not syncing new contact records created in the last 48 hours.
RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Found the Salesforce connected app token had expired. Re-authorized the integration and triggered a manual backfill for the missed sync window.

RESOLUTION_SUMMARY: Identified a version mismatch where the customer was hitting both v2 and v3 endpoints. Consolidated all calls to v3 and provided migration guidance for deprecated fields.

ISSUE_SUMMARY: Batch data import jobs timing out when processing files over 500MB.
